product_overview: Kaizen Axis is a mobile-first PWA for real-estate teams combining CRM, gamified workflows, geolocated check-ins and AI-driven pre-attendance to increase brokers' productivity and lead conversion.
core_goals: Increase broker productivity and engagement via gamification and real-time metrics
Reduce lead response time to under 5 minutes using automated distribution and AI pre-attendance
Provide secure, auditable presence verification (geolocated check-in) and fair lead distribution
Offer integrated CRM and document tools (PDF, uploads, income analysis) with PWA offline capabilities

features.name: Authentication & Onboarding (Login Page)
features.description: User authentication via Supabase (email/password + magic link) and guided onboarding for new brokers.
user_flows: POST /supabase/auth/v1/token with email and password -> Receive 200 with access_token and refresh_token -> GET /api/profile with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 with user profile -> GET /api/onboarding/status with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 onboarding_required:false
POST /supabase/auth/v1/token with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 invalid_credentials -> POST /supabase/auth/v1/magiclink with email -> Receive 200 magic_link_sent

features.name: Dashboard Page
features.description: Personalized dashboard showing real-time KPIs, widgets and leaderboards for brokers and managers.
user_flows: GET /api/dashboard/metrics with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with metrics payload (leads, conversions, XP) -> GET /api/dashboard/widgets with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with widget configurations
GET /api/dashboard/metrics with expired token -> Receive 401 unauthorized -> POST /supabase/auth/v1/token with refresh_token -> Receive 200 with new access_token

features.name: Check-in Geolocation (Check-in Page / Edge function)
features.description: Daily check-in validated by geolocation or QR token with anti-fraud checks and XP awarding.
user_flows: POST /edge/checkin-geo with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body {lat, lng} -> Receive 200 checkin_confirmed with queue_position and xp_awarded:+50 -> POST /api/user_points with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body {points:+50} -> Receive 200 points_updated

POST /edge/checkin-geo with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body {lat, lng outside allowed radius} -> Receive 400 location_out_of_range -> GET /api/checkin/qr_token with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with qr_token -> POST /edge/checkin-geo with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body {qr_token} -> Receive 200 checkin_confirmed

features.name: Lead Reception & Distribution (Edge: receive-lead)
features.description: Webhook intake for incoming leads, validation and smart round-robin assignment considering presence and load.
user_flows: POST /edge/receive-lead with webhook payload (lead data) -> Receive 200 lead_registered with lead_id -> GET /api/leads/:lead_id with Authorization: Bearer <service_token> -> Receive 200 lead details including assigned_agent -> POST /api/notifications with Authorization: Bearer <service_token> and body {agent_id, message} -> Receive 200 notification_delivered
POST /edge/receive-lead with malformed payload -> Receive 422 validation_error -> POST /edge/receive-lead with corrected payload -> Receive 200 lead_registered

features.name: Clients CRM (Clients, Client Details, New Client)
features.description: Create, view and update client records, maintain interaction history and move leads through pipeline stages.
user_flows: POST /api/clients with Authorization: Bearer <token> and client payload -> Receive 201 created with client_id -> GET /api/clients/:client_id with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 client_profile -> PUT /api/clients/:client_id with Authorization: Bearer <token> and updates -> Receive 200 updated_client

POST /api/clients with Authorization: Bearer <token> and missing required field -> Receive 422 validation_error -> PUT /api/clients/draft with Authorization: Bearer <token> and corrected payload -> Receive 201 created with client_id

features.name: Income Analysis (Apuração de Renda)
features.description: Upload bank statements to Supabase Storage and run deterministic income analysis to pre-qualify leads.
user_flows: POST /api/uploads with Authorization: Bearer <token> multipart/form-data file=bank_statement.pdf -> Receive 201 with file_url -> POST /api/income-analysis with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body {file_url} -> Receive 200 analysis_result {deterministic_income} -> PATCH /api/clients/:client_id with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body {income:deterministic_income} -> Receive 200 client_income_updated

POST /api/uploads with Authorization: Bearer <token> and unsupported file type (.exe) -> Receive 415 unsupported_media_type -> POST /api/uploads with Authorization: Bearer <token> and corrected file (.pdf) -> Receive 201 with file_url

features.name: WhatsApp Pre-attendance & Chat
features.description: Receive WhatsApp messages via Evolution API, run AI qualification, create leads and assign to brokers automatically.
user_flows: POST /api/wa/webhook with incoming message payload (from Evolution API) -> Receive 200 ack -> POST /api/ai/qualify-lead with body {text} -> Receive 200 qualification {name, region, budget} -> POST /api/leads with Authorization: Bearer <service_token> and qualification -> Receive 201 lead_created -> POST /api/notifications with Authorization: Bearer <service_token> -> Receive 200 notification_sent
POST /api/wa/webhook with oversized media payload -> Receive 413 payload_too_large -> POST /api/wa/media-retry with smaller payload -> Receive 200 ack

features.name: Developments Catalog
features.description: Browse developments catalog, view details and media; media served via signed Supabase Storage URLs.
user_flows: GET /api/developments with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 list_of_developments -> GET /api/developments/:id with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 development_details with media_keys -> GET /api/storage/signed-url with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body {media_key} -> Receive 200 signed_url

GET /api/developments/:id with Authorization: Bearer <token> for non-existent id -> Receive 404 not_found -> GET /api/developments?filter=region with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 filtered_results

features.name: Settings & Preferences
features.description: User profile and application settings management (notification prefs, check-in window, tenant branding for white-label).
user_flows: GET /api/profile/settings with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 settings_payload -> PUT /api/profile/settings with Authorization: Bearer <token> and updated_preferences -> Receive 200 settings_updated -> GET /api/profile/settings with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with updated_preferences

PUT /api/profile/settings with Authorization: Bearer <token> and invalid preference value -> Receive 400 invalid_value -> PUT /api/profile/settings with Authorization: Bearer <token> and corrected value -> Receive 200 settings_updated

features.name: PDF Tools & Document Operations
features.description: Merge, split, compress and protect PDFs and store generated files in Supabase Storage for client documents and contracts.
user_flows: POST /api/pdf/merge with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body {file_urls:[...]} -> Receive 200 merged_file_url -> POST /api/storage/sign with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body {file_url:merged_file_url} -> Receive 200 signed_download_url

POST /api/pdf/merge with Authorization: Bearer <token> and empty file list -> Receive 422 validation_error -> POST /api/pdf/merge with Authorization: Bearer <token> and corrected file list -> Receive 200 merged_file_url

features.name: Dashboard Page
features.description: Main hub of the application showing metrics and quick actions

features.name: Income Analysis (Apuração de Renda)
features.description: Frontend interface for uploading bank statements and analyzing income deterministically

features.name: Clients CRM
features.description: Manage client records, detail views, and new client entry

features.name: Developments catalog
features.description: Real estate developments showcase and details
